_instructions: Projects shown in the Projects section.
subtitle: Selected analytics engineering and data projects

projects.title: Modern Analytics Engineering Platform
projects.description: A complete analytics engineering platform from ingestion to reporting using dbt, Snowflake, and Airflow. Developed staging, intermediate, and mart-layer models following industry-standard architecture, with automated testing, documentation, lineage tracking, and data quality monitoring delivering analytics-ready datasets for KPI reporting, executive dashboards, and business intelligence.

projects.title: AI Training Dataset Pipeline & Monitoring Platform
projects.description: Scalable AI training data pipelines supporting NLP and LLM model development. Built Kafka and Spark Structured Streaming pipelines for real-time AI telemetry ingestion, feature engineering and dataset versioning frameworks for reproducible machine learning workflows, MLflow for experiment tracking and lifecycle management, and monitoring and validation frameworks that improve AI dataset quality and consistency.

projects.title: Email & SMS Performance Analytics Framework
projects.description: A comprehensive measurement framework for email and SMS/text channel performance covering metric definitions, experimentation design, and test-and-learn evaluation. Tableau dashboards and scorecards let stakeholders self-serve insights across open rates, conversion, and lifecycle engagement, while automated data-quality monitoring cut manual validation effort by 50%.

projects.title: Healthcare Data Analysis (Power BI)
projects.description: Power BI dashboards exploring healthcare KPIs across patient outcomes, throughput, and operational metrics.

projects.title: Cohort Analysis
projects.description: Customer cohort and retention analysis exploring behavioral patterns over time using Python and visualization libraries.

projects.title: Nursing Home Financial Analysis
projects.description: Financial trend and ratio analysis on nursing home data, building reporting views and surfacing operational insights.

projects.title: Uber Expenses Tracking
projects.description: End-to-end pipeline analyzing Uber trip and expense data, covering ingestion, cleaning, and visualization in Python notebooks.

projects.title: Log Analysis & Anomaly Detection
projects.description: Python pipeline for parsing application logs and surfacing anomalies using statistical and ML-based techniques.
